description_long: This is a tall, rectangular cabinet with a modern, minimalist design. The front features four vertical doors, with the central two doors distinguished by a darker horizontal band, likely indicating a different material or finish. The sides are plain and smooth, matching the lighter beige color of the main body. The back panel is a wood-textured surface, suggesting a veneered or laminated finish. The cabinet appears to be constructed primarily from engineered wood or MDF, with possible laminate or veneer surfaces for durability and aesthetics. There are no visible glass panels, and the handles are subtly integrated into the central seam of the front doors.
description: A tall, modern cabinet with four vertical doors, a dark central band, and a wood-textured back panel. The design is minimalist with smooth, beige surfaces and integrated handles.
description_view_0: A narrow side view showing the plain, smooth beige surface of the cabinet.
description_view_1: The front view displays four vertical doors, a dark central band, and subtle integrated handles.
description_view_2: The opposite side view, identical to view 0, shows a plain beige surface.
description_view_3: The back view reveals a wood-textured panel divided into six rectangular sections.
